checks: A turtle-shaped green powerup mesh (composed of multiple primitive shapes — a flattened ellipsoid body, a small sphere head, and small cylinder legs) is visible on the track surface, clearly distinguishable from the gold torus-shaped coins and red box obstacles
When the ball rolls into the turtle powerup, the turtle disappears (is collected) and a green 'SLOWED' indicator banner appears at the bottom-center of the screen
While the SLOWED indicator is visible, the ball moves noticeably slower than normal forward speed (approximately half speed)
After approximately 4 seconds, the SLOWED indicator disappears and the ball returns to its normal forward speed
Existing coins are still visible as gold torus shapes on the track and can still be collected to increment the score displayed in the top-left
Existing red obstacles are still present on the track and colliding with them still causes the ball to fall off (game over)
After a game-over and restart, a new turtle powerup appears at a (potentially different) random position on the track
